sourceMovie.title: White Bird
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: White Bird works as a drama movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The drama and war blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Jojo Rabbit
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If White Bird clicked for you, Jojo Rabbit (2019) is a strong next stop: both trade in drama and war, with comic timing and sharper banter. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after White Bird?
faq.answer: Try Jojo Rabbit, The Boy in the Striped Pyjamas, The Zookeeper's Wife—each shares DNA with White Bird while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is White Bird?
faq.answer: White Bird (2023) is best described as Drama, War. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is White Bird worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 7.8/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this drama lane.
